title: Reverse Transcription of RNA to cDNA
author: Igem Dusseldorf
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8bjhskn
materials: Prepare a Mastermix of the following reagents: 4 µL 5x RT-buffer 2 µL dNTP Mix (10 mM of each nucleotide) 1 µL RevertAid Reverse Transcriptase

steps.title: 33,25 µL 40x yellow sample buffer...
steps.instruction: 33,25 µL 40x yellow sample buffer + 966,75 µL H2O optional: This was used to be able to see the pipetting scheme for qPCR more easily

steps.title: In PCR stripes, pipet in the following order
steps.instruction: In PCR stripes, pipet in the following order: 100 ng template RNA 1 µL random hexamer primers RNase-free H2O to 13 µL volume

steps.title: Add 7 µL Mastermix to each reaction
steps.instruction: Add 7 µL Mastermix to each reaction

steps.title: For your -RT control, pipet 100...
steps.instruction: For your -RT control, pipet 100 ng RNA in PCR stripes, leave out buffer and everything, just add H2O to a final volume of 20 µL. Mark as -RT so you can distinguish it from your actual cDNA!

steps.title: Add 60 µL 1,33 x yellow...
steps.instruction: Add 60 µL 1,33 x yellow sample buffer to each reaction optional: This was used to be able to see the pipetting scheme for qPCR more easily

steps.title: cDNA can be stored at 4...
steps.instruction: cDNA can be stored at 4 ˚C for a short time, otherwise, freeze at -20 ˚C
